children.text: a citizen or national of the United States;
an alien who is lawfully admitted for permanent residence under the Immigration and Nationality Act;
an alien who has been granted the status of Cuban and Haitian entrant, as defined in section 501(e) of the Refugee Education Assistance Act of 1980 (); orPublic Law 96–422
an individual who lawfully resides in the United States in accordance with a Compact of Free Association referred to in .section 1612(b)(2)(G) of title 8

children.heading: Application to individuals currently entitled to or enrolled for benefits
children.label: b Application to individuals currently entitled to or enrolled for benefits

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In the case of an individual who is entitled to, or enrolled for, benefits under this subchapter as of , subsection (a) shall apply beginning on the date that is 18 months after .July 4, 2025July 4, 2025

children.heading: Review by Commissioner of Social Security
children.label: 2 Review by Commissioner of Social Security

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Commissioner of Social Security shall complete a review of individuals entitled to, or enrolled for, benefits under this subchapter as of , for purposes of identifying individuals not described in any of paragraphs (1) through (4) of subsection (a).July 4, 2025July 4, 2025

children.heading: Notice
children.label: B Notice
children.text: The Commissioner of Social Security shall notify each individual identified under the review conducted under subparagraph (A) that such individual’s entitlement to, or enrollment for, benefits under this subchapter will be terminated as of the date that is 18 months after . Such notification shall be made as soon as practicable after such identification and in a manner designed to ensure such individual’s comprehension of such notification.July 4, 2025
